offer.headline: Veggie Wrap Combo - 15% Off
offer.body_line: Enjoy our fresh vegetarian wrap with soup, ready in under 10 minutes. Valid today only.
offer.image_prompt: A close-up of a colorful vegetarian wrap with fresh vegetables, hummus, and a side salad on a cafe table, natural lighting.

why_now_factors: Matches user intent for quick lunch, vegetarian only, fills quiet hours, uses max allowed discount and validity.

offer.merchant_disclaimer: Offer valid for dine-in only. Not combinable with other promotions.
